chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-170 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For hearing of main case 2.For hearing of MA 2574/23 07-05-2024 None present for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ***** None present for the applicant; no intimation is received so far; same was the position on the last date of hearing i.e. 02.04.2024, when brief was held on behalf of applicant’s counsel. The case-diaries show that applicant and her counsel have not taken much interest in the matter. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
